title: Eating Animal Based on a Budget

chunks.title: Introduction to Meat Shopping at Costco
chunks.summary: The video begins with an overview of shopping for meat at Costco, emphasizing its popularity and variety. The speaker expresses a preference for grass-fed steaks but acknowledges that Costco primarily offers grain-finished options.

chunks.title: Grain-Finished vs. Grass-Fed Steaks
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses the differences between grain-finished and grass-fed steaks, highlighting the potential downsides of grain-finished meat such as pesticide exposure and reduced environmental benefits. They explain the USDA grading of steaks, focusing on marbling and quality.

There going to be more mold toxins, microplastics. We know that grass-fed beef has less of the bad things. That's not to say that grain finished meat is not good for you.
